summary: #84545 remains the live canonical PR for the Gemini 3.5 Flash Google resolver failure. #91546 overlaps that same root cause and is superseded by #84545, with its static catalog row preserved as credited follow-up material if maintainers fold it into the canonical path.

actions.reason: #84545 is the older, focused, maintainer-modifiable, proof-positive PR for the shared Gemini 3.5 Flash resolver root cause.
#91546 is superseded by the canonical #84545 resolver fix for the same user-visible Gemini 3.5 Flash runtime failure; its extra catalog row should retain source PR credit if reused.
